title.description: Vito ra pulatifomo leri kombisiwaka eka xihloko. Pulatifomo yo kuma swiresipe swa swakudya swa misava hinkwayo.

subtitle.description: Xivutiso lexi kombisiwaka ehansi ka vito ra pulatifomo eka xihloko.

heroTitle.description: Xihloko lexikulu eka xiphemu xa hero xa peji ra le ka ndzhawu ya le ka khaya.

heroSubtitle.text: Hlaya swiresipe swa ntiyiso swa xikolo xa swakudya swa misava hinkwayo
heroSubtitle.description: Xivutiso lexi kombisiwaka ehansi ka xihloko xa hero eka peji ra le ka ndzhawu ya le ka khaya.

featuredTitle.description: Xihloko xa xiphemu lexi kombisiwaka eka xisungulo xa grid ya makhadi ya swiresipe.

cookingTime.description: Xiphemu xa nkarhi wa ku pheka eka khadi ra swiresipe. {minutes} yi hundzuluxiwa hi nhumeri ya timinete.

difficulty.description: Xiphemu lexi kombisiwaka eka xiphemu xa matimba eka khadi ra swiresipe.

easy.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinga olovaka.

medium.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinga olovaka swinene.

hard.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinene swinene.

label.description: Xiphemu lexi endlaka leswaku ku cinca ririmi eka xihloko.

en.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xinghezi eka ku cinca ka ririmi.

ja.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xijapani eka ku cinca ka ririmi.

es.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xihispaniya eka ku cinca ka ririmi.
